case_title: JULIANNE WU VS. KEVIN CHENG, et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: GEOFFREY HOWARD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER DEFNDANT, HOWEVER TODD MAVIS, BUSINESS PARTNER OF DEFENDANT KEVIN CHENG PRESENT ON HIS BEHALF. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD FILED BY WU, JULIANNE CHENG, KEVIN
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2009 - JUDGMENT ENTERED (525)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-28-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KOO, GUM D
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, JULIANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHENG, KEVIN KOO, GUM D $2,802.95 PRINCIPAL, $479.91 INTEREST, $351.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,634.36, DEFENDANT DID NOT RETURN SECURITY DEPOSIT WITHIN 21 DAYS (CERTIFIED MAILING INDICATES OCTOBER 23, 2008 MAILING AND PARTIES AGREED MOVE OUT WAS SEPTEMBER 30, 2008). DEDUCTIONS ARE NOT PROPER. $1000.00 IN PUNITIVE DAMAGES AWARDED FOR TESTIFYING TO FALSE ADDRESS AND MAIL DATE, AND WRONGFUL WITHHOLDING OF SECURITY FOR UTILITIES, RENT BOARD PASS THROUGH AND DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Julianne Wu, Plaintiff/Respondent, appears in pro per, with witness Todd Mavis
Kevin Cheng, Defendant/Appellant, appears in pro per

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Both parties have signed the Stipulation to Use Judge Pro Tem. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Evidence is retained.

JPT David Edward May, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-10-2009 Judgment Entered
